case_title: ROBERT J. WOOL VS. ROBERT LAVERY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF ROBERT J. WOOL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROBERT LAVERY IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: MOTION TO VACATE IS DENIED.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LAVERY, ROBERT HEARING SET FOR DEC-27-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ROBERT LAVERY ON DEC-27-2021 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF ROBERT J. WOOL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROBERT LAVERY IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY WOOL, ROBERT J. AS TO DEFENDANT LAVERY, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT LAVERY, ROBERT
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL **DENIED** UNTIMELY VENUE CAN BE ADDRESSED AT HEARING

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOOL, ROBERT J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAVERY, ROBERT $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,070.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR DESPITE PROPER NOTICE AND WAS NOT GRANTED A CONTINUANCE. PLAINTIFFS EVIDENCE PRESENTED CONFIRMS RECEIPT OF SECURITY DEPOSIT AND THERE WAS BAD FAITH FOR NO COMMUNICATION OR EFFORT TO RETURN SECURITY DEPOSIT PER CCP 1950.5 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED AUG-13-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAVERY, ROBERT
